channel.title: Huddle
channel.description: Your first read on Capitol Hill politics and policy.

item.title: The new faces of the Freedom Caucus
item.description: The House Freedom Caucus is suddenly confronting an unsettled future after more than a decade at the center of GOP politics on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: What Schumer told us about AI
item.dc:creator: By Jordain Carney and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Jordain Carney and Calen Razor

item.title: Democrats’ H.R. 1 problem
item.description: Hakeem Jeffries wants "affordability" to be House Democrats’ primary legislative pitch heading into the midterms. But not all his members agree it should be “H.R. 1” if they win back the majority.
item.dc:creator: By Riley Rogerson and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Riley Rogerson and Calen Razor

item.title: Lawmakers worry a shutdown is inevitable
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor, Jennifer Scholtes and Katherine Tully-McManus
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor, Jennifer Scholtes and Katherine Tully-McManus

item.title: Drama as House GOP eyes next big swing
item.description: Today’s the day House Republicans are hoping to put one reconciliation bill behind them and start moving on another.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy, Meredith Lee Hill and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy, Meredith Lee Hill and Calen Razor

item.title: Five days to save FISA
item.description: Republicans are about to put one Donald Trump-induced headache behind them — but another is right behind it.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Next stop Reconciliation 3.0? Not so fast
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Trump fund drama comes to vote-a-rama
item.description: Republicans are on the verge of finally passing their massive $70 billion immigration enforcement bill — but first they’ll need to stick together through an obstacle course of tricky votes meant to squeeze their most vulnerable incumbents.
item.dc:creator: By Jordain Carney and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Jordain Carney and Calen Razor

item.title: Trump’s intel pick endangers spy powers bill
item.description: President Donald Trump's pick of a political ally as acting director of national intelligence could jeopardize the passage of a key government spy powers renewal just as lawmakers were closing in on a deal.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: Trump officials try to calm ‘slush’ fund fury
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche has a chance today to convince Republicans he’s dropping plans for a controversial $1.8 billion “Anti-Weaponization Fund.” But it’s unclear if members of his party will be swayed enough to unjam President Donald Trump’s larger agenda.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Jordain Carney
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Jordain Carney

item.title: Trump fund angst keeps GOP agenda in limbo
item.description: After leaving town late last month for a one-week recess, House and Senate GOP leaders are returning to a slew of familiar problems threatening to leave their midterm-year agenda stalled in perennial limbo.
item.dc:creator: By Jordain Carney and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Jordain Carney and Calen Razor

item.title: The Epstein interview you won’t see
item.description: Pam Bondi is back on Capitol Hill today to answer questions about the Jeffrey Epstein files. But Americans won’t be able to watch lawmakers grill her on the sex trafficking case that has sparked bipartisan outrage and conspiracy-fueling intrigue.
item.dc:creator: By Hailey Fuchs and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Hailey Fuchs and Calen Razor

item.title: ‘Get a warrant’: FISA fights resurface
item.description: Congress has just over two weeks before a key spy power is set to expire — again.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy, Jordain Carney and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy, Jordain Carney and Calen Razor

item.title: Down goes Cornyn. These 2028ers may be next.
item.description: President Donald Trump’s revenge tour claimed a third Capitol Hill victim Tuesday night with Sen. John Cornyn’s runoff defeat against Ken Paxton. Now some Republicans are looking towards 2028 and wary this is just the opening act.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Jordain Carney
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Jordain Carney

item.title: Trump’s revenge tour heads to Texas
item.description: President Donald Trump is poised to welcome yet another victory on his revenge tour today despite the risk it could have on his Capitol Hill priorities.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: Fury and frustration derail GOP agenda
item.description: Lawmakers gave up on a series of tough votes and jetted out of town Thursday, putting off until June a bevy of political headaches.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: Dems try to twist knife in Trump-GOP tensions
item.description: A marathon vote series on the Senate floor today could be a big test of President Donald Trump’s ability to get his agenda through Congress after wracking up a body count of lawmakers who have crossed him.
item.dc:creator: By Jordain Carney and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Jordain Carney and Calen Razor

item.title: Trump may regret his revenge tour
item.description: President Donald Trump notched more wins Tuesday in his revenge campaign against Republican lawmakers who’ve crossed him. But his victory lap may be short-lived.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: Trump turns to Massie after Cassidy revenge
item.description: President Donald Trump’s grip on the Republican party will be tested again in Kentucky’s primary today where he’s trying to oust longtime nemesis Rep. Thomas Massie.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Jordain Carney
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Jordain Carney

item.title: Inside the scramble to notch bipartisan wins
item.description: There's a quiet scramble underway to get bipartisan legislating done this week before the midterms loom too large — if President Donald Trump doesn't screw it up.
item.dc:creator: By Kelsey Brugger and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Kelsey Brugger and Calen Razor

item.title: Nervous GOP weighs options on ballroom
item.description: Republicans uneasy about the political risk of taxpayer dollars going toward the new White House ballroom are hoping an obscure procedural rule keeper will make the decision for them as soon as today.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy

item.title: ‘Crush their souls’: Map losses spur Dem rage
item.description: Democrats are ready to take the gloves off and play hardball after a stunning series of redistricting losses that could kneecap the party’s power in Congress for years to come.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: House eyes summer for another party-line bill
item.description: House Republicans are aiming to finish before August another party-line bill that they hope will help persuade voters to keep them in power in midterm elections.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Trump officials pitch GOP on ballroom funds
item.description: Administration officials are trying to win Hill Republicans’ blessing for $1 billion in security funding that could go towards parts of President Donald Trump’s ballroom project.
item.dc:creator: By Jordain Carney, Meredith Lee Hill and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Jordain Carney, Meredith Lee Hill and Calen Razor

item.title: House vs. Senate rift threatens GOP agenda
item.description: Tensions between House and Senate Republicans are threatening the GOP’s legislative agenda ahead of the midterms.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: GOP wrangles wishlist ahead of midterms
item.description: Republicans facing a grueling midterm outlook see passing a sweeping package of party priorities as their best chance to win over voters, but it won’t be easy.
item.dc:creator: By Meredith Lee Hill, Mia McCarthy, Jennifer Scholtes and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Meredith Lee Hill, Mia McCarthy, Jennifer Scholtes and Calen Razor

item.title: Congress, voters lukewarm on election bill
item.description: President Donald Trump hasn’t been able to whip up enough support in Congress to pass his election security bill. New POLITICO polling shows there isn’t overwhelming voter enthusiasm for it, either.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: Lutnick faces Hill’s Epstein gauntlet
item.description: Howard Lutnick is the latest Trump Cabinet secretary whose congressional testimony poses a risk to their political future. House Oversight lawmakers today will interview the Commerce chief about his relationship with Jeffrey Epstein.
item.dc:creator: By Hailey Fuchs and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Hailey Fuchs and Calen Razor

item.title: Trump’s GOP sway gets a primary test
item.description: A test of President Donald Trump’s grip on the Republican coalition begins today in Indiana and Ohio and continues through a half-dozen state primaries this month.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor

item.title: Dems’ AI message narrower than voters’ fears
item.description: House Democrats are settling on a narrow artificial intelligence message ahead of the midterms, and critics already say they are missing a massive opportunity.
item.dc:creator: By Riley Rogerson and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Riley Rogerson and Calen Razor
